symptoms.symptom_name: Perioral numbness and paraesthesia of lips and fingers

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Perioral and acral paraesthesia is an early hallmark of hypocalcaemic neuromuscular irritability.

symptoms.symptom_name: Carpopedal spasm — hands and feet locked in flexion

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Tetanic carpopedal spasm is a defining feature of severe symptomatic hypocalcaemia.
Tetanus produces trismus and generalised rigidity rather than isolated carpopedal spasm with perioral sensory change.
Spontaneous facial twitching reflects hyperexcitable motor nerves from low ionised calcium.

symptoms.symptom_name: Subjective dyspnoea / sensation of throat tightness

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: May herald laryngospasm — an immediate airway threat in severe hypocalcaemia; also compounded by anxiety-driven hyperventilation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recent total thyroidectomy with abrupt cessation of calcium and calcitriol replacement

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: acute symptomatic hypocalcaemia secondary to post-surgical hypoparathyroidism
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Provides the definitive organic cause — post-surgical hypoparathyroidism unmasked by stopping replacement therapy.

Facial twitch on tapping the facial nerve indicates neuromuscular irritability — a clinician-elicited sign not obtainable via telehealth; the AI infers irritability from the reported spontaneous twitching, not a measured sign.
Carpal spasm on sphygmomanometer inflation is highly specific for hypocalcaemic tetany — requires a cuff and clinician manoeuvre; sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Low serum calcium with high phosphate

investigation_details.expected_result: Low calcium with high phosphate (anticipated, pending hospital bloods)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Biochemical severity and the need for IV calcium cannot be confirmed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms the diagnosis and quantifies severity — a hospital venous blood test never available in real time via telehealth.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Underlying hypoparathyroidism not confirmed for ongoing management.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms the parathyroid cause of the hypocalcaemia — hospital assay, not available via telehealth.

investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Arrhythmia risk from prolonged QT not detected or monitored.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Prolonged QT is the cardiac danger of severe hypocalcaemia — requires an ECG the AI cannot obtain, mandating hospital monitoring.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Perioral paraesthesia + carpopedal spasm + facial twitching + positive Chvostek's/Trousseau's together are near-pathognomonic for symptomatic hypocalcaemia in the right context.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent hospital serum calcium, phosphate, magnesium and PTH
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms and quantifies the hypocalcaemia and its parathyroid cause and identifies coexistent hypomagnesaemia — obtained on arrival at ED, not via telehealth.
Detects and monitors QT prolongation and arrhythmia risk during IV calcium replacement.
